_note: Dev-only harness presets, hidden from regular users. Each preset is a named GLRS_AGENT_OVERRIDES payload (per-agent {model, prompt}) plus an id that tags telemetry (GLRS_DEV_PRESET) so cost/speed/outcomes can be correlated per preset. Override or add presets in ~/.glrs/dev-presets.json (same shape) to iterate without republishing. `prompt` is a path relative to the repo root.

presets.label: Baseline (plugin defaults)
presets.description: Control group — no overrides; only tags telemetry so other presets can be compared against the shipped defaults.

presets.label: Opus orchestration
presets.description: Prime + plan on Opus 4.8 for heavier reasoning at the orchestration layer.

presets.label: All-Sonnet (cheap/fast)
presets.description: Prime/plan/build on Sonnet 4.6 to measure the cost/speed delta against Opus orchestration.
